name: Cinefin Integration
description: A secure proxy and orchestration layer for the Cinefin Android app. Integrates Sonarr, Radarr, and Overseerr directly into Jellyfin.
overview: Integrates Sonarr, Radarr, and Overseerr into Jellyfin for the Cinefin app.

versions.changelog: Initial release with Sonarr, Radarr, and Overseerr integration.
